title: Spathiphyllum longirostre
taxonomy: Spathiphyllum longirostre is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Alismataceae. It belongs to the genus Spathiphyllum, which is a group of tropical plants commonly known as spathiphyllum or peace lilies. The Alismataceae family is a group of aquatic and terrestrial plants that are primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions. Spathiphyllum longirostre is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America.
